Package shelter.repository.csv

package shelter.repository.csv
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    shelter.repository
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CsvAdopterRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AdopterRepository that persists adopter records to a flat file named adopters.csv.
    CsvAdoptionRequestRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AdoptionRequestRepository that persists adoption request records to a flat file named adoption-requests.csv.
    CsvAnimalRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AnimalRepository that persists animal records to a flat file named animals.csv.
    CsvAuditRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of AuditRepository that appends audit log entries to a flat file named audit.csv.
    CsvShelterRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of ShelterRepository that persists shelter records to a flat file.
    CsvTransferRequestRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of TransferRequestRepository that persists transfer request records to a flat file named transfer-requests.csv.
    CsvUtils
    Utility class providing static helper methods for reading and writing CSV data.
    CsvVaccinationRecordRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of VaccinationRecordRepository that persists vaccination history to a flat file named vaccination-records.csv.
    CsvVaccineTypeRepository
    CSV-backed implementation of VaccineTypeRepository that persists vaccine type catalog entries to a flat file named vaccine-types.csv.
